voidDialog.title: Ma baajinaysaa iibkan?
voidDialog.description: Tani waxay diiwaan gelinaysaa diiwaan rogis ah oo soo celiya kayd-ka, bixinta, iyo deynta. Safaf asalka ah ayaa weli ka muuqdaya taariikhda iyada oo leh calaamadda La baajiyay. Tan dib looma celin karo — si aad mar kale u sameyso, iib cusub ku diiwaan geli mobaylka.
voidDialog.reasonPlaceholder: tusaale macmiil khaldan, alaab khaldan, soo celin
voidDialog.reasonRequired: Fadlan geli sabab. Diiwaanka u baahan yahay.
voidDialog.windowExpired: Wakhtiga baajinta ayaa dhammaaday (>7 maalmood). Hagaajin iib cusub.
voidDialog.ownerOnly: Kaliya milkiilaha dukaanka ayaa baajin kara iibka.
voidDialog.errorGeneric: Lama baajin karin. Mar kale isku day.

modulePlaceholder.notImplemented: Qaybtan way diyaarsan tahay laakiin weli lama dhisin. Waxaa la raacayaa {task} ee docs/shop-admin-portal-alignment.md.
modulePlaceholder.overview: Maanta, toddobaadkan, bishan — dukaamada oo dhan.
modulePlaceholder.inventory: Alaabta, kaydka, hagaajinta, kayd-yar, kuwa ugu badan, kuwa aan dhaqaaqayn.
modulePlaceholder.setup: Habaynta dukaanka, shaqaalaha, doorka, qaab-dhismeedka, isku-xirka.
modulePlaceholder.audit: Diiwaan la baadhi karo oo dhammaan ficillada dukaankan.

login.emailErrorGeneric: Lama diri karin linkiga. Mar kale isku day.
login.errorGeneric: Wax baa khaldamay. Mar kale isku day.
login.errorSend: Lama dirin karin koodhka. Mar kale isku day.
login.callbackError: Linkigaas soo galid ma shaqayn. Mid kale dir.
